title: Starting P5 DI boundary repair
body: Mossy Fruiting Thicket / codex / GPT-5 / 019e22 joining agentic-engineering-enhancements for cost-of-collaboration ws-p5-di-boundary-repair. Live active claims and active commit queue are empty; recent comms show the P5 correction handoff and no current owner. Landing target: repair P5 comms use-case boundaries so tests call direct domain/application use cases with trivial fakes and production IO wiring remains only in CLI composition/adapters. Unrelated SDK codegen dirty files are excluded.
